pi_items.source: Verified against task description instructions ('Enable the Jitsi integration') and setup script initialization defaults.
Verified against task description instructions ('Set the Domain to: meet.secure-internal.example.com').
Verified against task description instructions ('Enable 'Open New Window'').
Verified against task description instructions ('Enable 'Enable in Channels'').
Verified against task description instructions ('Disable 'Enable in Direct Messages'').

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rocket_chat_env configure_video_conferencing task by confirming that the Jitsi configuration values are synthetic. Explicitly verified that the expected Domain ('meet.secure-internal.example.com'), Enabled state ('true'), Open New Window ('true'), Enable in Channels ('true'), and Enable in Direct Messages ('false') exactly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
